note: AI-generated card art provenance for current Blood Rogue review batches.

entries.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing incoming arrows or bolts suspended and turning sluggish in a field of occult wind, as if time itself has thickened around the hunter.
Subject: one centered cluster of hostile missiles hanging in smoky air against a defensive arcane ward, no full character body.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, strong centered silhouette, dark uncluttered edges, readable inside a small card art window.
Lighting/mood: defensive, uncanny, time-dilating, controlled.
Color palette: cold iron, ash gray, dim ivory, muted blue-gray, soot black.
Materials/textures: feathered shafts, iron arrowheads, smoke, wind streaks, faint occult shimmer.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern objects.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no busy battlefield, no bright neon magic.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing twin assassin blades sweeping in a freezing cross-cut, shedding shards of ice and a thin halo of killing cold.
Subject: one centered pair of curved blades or wrist blades crossing through darkness, no full character body.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, tight central slash motif, dark uncluttered edges, very readable at small size.
Lighting/mood: cold, exact, silent, predatory.
Color palette: glacial blue-white, ash silver, soot black, muted steel, faint cyan frost.
Materials/textures: sharpened metal, frost crystals, icy mist, shattered rime, dark leather.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern weapons.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no bright neon ice, no busy scene.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing a battle-worn weapon held in a gauntleted grip like a sacred inheritance, surrounded by restrained signs of practiced mastery rather than wild spectacle.
Subject: one centered heirloom weapon in a powerful grip, no full character body, no large background scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, close martial vignette, clear central silhouette, dark edges for card cropping.
Lighting/mood: seasoned, martial, grounded, commanding.
Color palette: black iron, old bronze, dark leather, ember red, soot black.
Materials/textures: nicked steel, scarred leather wrap, gauntlet metal, sparks, ash.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern weapons.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no oversized magical glow, no busy battlefield.
